mode.title: Orchestrator Mode
mode.description: daily = Montgomery (foreclosure + probate + sheriff_sale); weekly = 6 SW Ohio counties (Butler/Clark/Clermont/Greene/Miami/Warren); quarterly = Montgomery tax_delinquent with auditor enrichment.

date_from.title: Date From (optional override)
date_from.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Overrides the per-mode default lookback window. Leave blank for the standard 7-day catch-up (probate) / 2-day window (foreclosure).

date_to.title: Date To (optional override)
date_to.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today when blank.

sheriff_new_only.title: Sheriff sale — new-only filter
sheriff_new_only.description: When true (default), suppresses sheriff_sale case#s already emitted on prior runs (state file tracks them). Set false for backfills.

onbase_enabled.title: OnBase PDF Vision enrichment (probate phones)
onbase_enabled.description: Extract fiduciary phones from court-filed application PDFs via Claude Vision.

tracerfy_enabled.title: Tracerfy skip-trace (non-probate)
tracerfy_enabled.description: Skip-trace foreclosure + sheriff_sale + tax_delinquent owners via Tracerfy.

trestle_enabled.title: Trestle phone tier scoring
trestle_enabled.description: Score Tracerfy-returned phones into Dial First / Second / Third / Fourth tiers.

onbase_daily_cost_cap_usd.title: OnBase Vision daily cost cap (USD)
onbase_daily_cost_cap_usd.description: Hard ceiling on OnBase spend per run.

tracerfy_daily_cost_cap_usd.title: Tracerfy daily cost cap (USD)
tracerfy_daily_cost_cap_usd.description: Hard ceiling on Tracerfy spend per run.

trestle_daily_cost_cap_usd.title: Trestle daily cost cap (USD)
trestle_daily_cost_cap_usd.description: Hard ceiling on Trestle spend per run.

captcha_api_key.title: 2Captcha API Key
captcha_api_key.description: Used to solve reCAPTCHA v3 for pro.mcohio.org foreclosure searches (BUG-04 mitigation).

pro_mcohio_recaptcha_v3_sitekey.title: pro.mcohio.org reCAPTCHA v3 sitekey
pro_mcohio_recaptcha_v3_sitekey.description: Defaults to the sitekey captured on 2026-07-01. Override if the site rotates.

pro_mcohio_recaptcha_v3_action.title: pro.mcohio.org reCAPTCHA v3 action
pro_mcohio_recaptcha_v3_action.description: The action string the site's grecaptcha.execute() call uses. 'submit' is the best-effort default; override if DevTools inspection reveals a different action.

pro_mcohio_recaptcha_v3_min_score.title: pro.mcohio.org reCAPTCHA v3 min score
pro_mcohio_recaptcha_v3_min_score.description: 0.3 is 2Captcha's default baseline for v3. Bump toward 0.9 if the site's server-side threshold is strict.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropic_api_key.description: Claude Vision for OnBase PDF phone extraction + heir address LLM lookups.

trestle_api_key.title: Trestle API Key
trestle_api_key.description: Score phone numbers into dial tiers.

datasift_email.title: DataSift Login Email
datasift_email.description: Only needed if upload=true (default is Slack file-drop only).

slack_webhook_url.title: Slack Webhook URL (fallback)
slack_webhook_url.description: Legacy webhook fallback; prefer slack_bot_token above.

upload_datasift.title: Upload to DataSift after scrape
upload_datasift.description: When true, runs the Playwright DataSift upload wizard after CSV write. Default false = Slack file-drop only.

headless.title: Headless browser
headless.description: Set false only for local debugging (never in production).

dry_run.title: Dry run
dry_run.description: Print routing plan without scraping. Use to verify county/list mapping.

max_cases.title: Max cases per source (backfill cap)
max_cases.description: Per-source-type cap. Default = no cap (0). Set 50-100 for exploratory backfills.
